name: Integrated Terminal
description: Provides a ConPTY-based pseudo-terminal with command history, multiple tabs, and working directory tracking. Allows developers to run shell commands directly within Spritely.

ConPtyTerminal.cs.content:
class ConPtyTerminal
  HistoryIndex: int
  HasBeenUsed: bool
  AddCommand(string command) -> void
  GetCommandFromEnd(int historyIndex) -> string?
  WorkingDirectory: string
  ProcessId: int
  SendLine(string text) -> void
  SendRaw(string text) -> void
  SendInterrupt() -> void
  GetOutputText() -> string
  ClearOutput() -> void
  Dispose() -> void

TerminalTabManager.cs.content:
class TerminalTabManager
  UpdateWorkingDirectory(string directory) -> void
  AddTerminal(string? workingDirectory = null) -> void
  CloseTerminal(int index) -> void
  SwitchTo(int index) -> void
  SendCommand() -> void
  SendInterrupt() -> void
  HandleKeyDown(KeyEventArgs e) -> void
  Dispose() -> void

dependencies: Windows ConPTY API for process I/O
Working directory synced with project selection
